mapper.sql: select cs.sno, cs.cno, cs.semester, cs.normal_score, cs.test_score, s.sname, c.cname, CONCAT(cs.sno, '-', cs.cno) as id from courseselection cs left join student s on cs.sno = s.sno left join course c on cs.cno = c.cno
mapper.select:
and cs.sno like concat('%', #{sno}, '%') and cs.cno like concat('%', #{cno}, '%') and cs.semester like concat('%', #{semester}, '%')
order by cs.sno, cs.cno

select cs.sno, cs.cno, cs.semester, cs.normal_score, cs.test_score, s.sname, c.cname, CONCAT(cs.sno, '-', cs.cno) as id from courseselection cs left join student s on cs.sno = s.sno left join course c on cs.cno = c.cno left join class cl on c.cno = cl.cno
cl.tno = #{tno} and cs.sno like concat('%', #{sno}, '%') and cs.cno like concat('%', #{cno}, '%') and cs.semester like concat('%', #{semester}, '%')
order by cs.sno, cs.cno
mapper.insert:
insert into courseselection
sno, cno, semester, normal_score, test_score,
values
#{sno}, #{cno}, #{semester}, #{normalScore}, #{testScore},
mapper.delete: delete from courseselection where sno = #{param1} and cno = #{param2}
mapper.select: select cno as "cno", cname as "cname", credit as "credit", course_type as "courseType", dept_name as "deptName", teacher_name as "teacherName", class_time as "classTime", semester as "semester", enrolled_count as "enrolledCount", avg_score as "avgScore" from v_course_enrollment order by cno

select sno as "sno", sname as "sname", cno as "cno", cname as "cname", semester as "semester", normal_score as "normalScore", test_score as "testScore", total_score as "totalScore" from v_fail_students order by sno

select tno as "tno", tname as "tname", cno as "cno", cname as "cname", semester as "semester", class_time as "classTime", dept_name as "deptName" from v_teacher_schedule where tno = #{tno} order by semester, cno
select count(*) from courseselection where sno = #{sno} and cno = #{cno}

select cs.cno as "cno", c.cname as "cname", c.credit as "credit", cl.class_time as "classTime", cl.exam_time as "examTime", cl.semester as "semester", t.tname as "teacherName" from courseselection cs join class cl on cs.cno = cl.cno join course c on cs.cno = c.cno join teacher t on cl.tno = t.tno where cs.sno = #{sno} order by cl.class_time

select case when (cs.normal_score * 0.4 + cs.test_score * 0.6) >= 90 then '优秀(90+)' when (cs.normal_score * 0.4 + cs.test_score * 0.6) >= 80 then '良好(80-89)' when (cs.normal_score * 0.4 + cs.test_score * 0.6) >= 70 then '中等(70-79)' when (cs.normal_score * 0.4 + cs.test_score * 0.6) >= 60 then '及格(60-69)' else '不及格(低于60)' end as name, count(*) as value from courseselection cs where cs.normal_score is not null and cs.test_score is not null group by name order by field(name, '优秀(90+)', '良好(80-89)', '中等(70-79)', '及格(60-69)', '不及格(低于60)')

select d.dept_name as name, ifnull(count(cs.sno), 0) as value from department d join course c on d.dept_id = c.dept_id left join courseselection cs on c.cno = cs.cno group by d.dept_id, d.dept_name order by value desc

select cs.sno, cs.normal_score as "normalScore", cs.test_score as "testScore", c.credit from courseselection cs join course c on cs.cno = c.cno where cs.normal_score is not null and cs.test_score is not null and c.credit is not null order by cs.sno

select c.cno as "cno", c.cname as "cname", c.credit as "credit", count(cs.sno) as "totalStudents", count(case when cs.normal_score is not null and cs.test_score is not null then 1 end) as "gradedStudents", round(avg(cs.normal_score * 0.4 + cs.test_score * 0.6), 1) as "avgScore", round(max(cs.normal_score * 0.4 + cs.test_score * 0.6), 1) as "maxScore", round(min(cs.normal_score * 0.4 + cs.test_score * 0.6), 1) as "minScore", round(sum(case when (cs.normal_score * 0.4 + cs.test_score * 0.6) >= 60 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / nullif(count(case when cs.normal_score is not null and cs.test_score is not null then 1 end), 0), 1) as "passRate" from class cl join course c on cl.cno = c.cno left join courseselection cs on c.cno = cs.cno where cl.tno = #{tno} group by c.cno, c.cname, c.credit order by c.cno

select cs.cno as "cno", c.cname as "cname", c.credit as "credit", c.course_type as "courseType", cs.semester as "semester", cs.normal_score as "normalScore", cs.test_score as "testScore", (cs.normal_score * 0.4 + cs.test_score * 0.6) as "totalScore" from courseselection cs join course c on cs.cno = c.cno where cs.sno = #{sno} order by cs.semester, cs.cno
